_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of compliance assessment methodologies, including control testing, evidence gathering, gap analysis, and findings documentation standards.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-K-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-005 (RC, cosine: 0.426), RC-K-007 (RC, cosine: 0.404).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.6/10 (raw 0.264). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [impact, implementation, signature] vs WIDAI-only terms [analysis, assessment, compliance, control, documentation, evidence] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.884 (P=0.914, R=0.856). P exceeds R by 0.058 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 16 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (92.8%). "Knowledge of signature implementation impact." and "Knowledge of compliance assessment methodologies, including control testing, evi" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.432 > STS 0.264 (gap +0.168). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.5%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [impact, implementation, signature]. WIDAI-only: [analysis, assessment, compliance, control, documentation, evidence].
